description_long: This property features a large, modern house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, multiple stories, and expansive windows. The main building is complemented by two outbuildings: a greenhouse with a transparent roof and a smaller, detached garage or shed with a dark gable roof. The main house has a prominent front entryway, a rooftop terrace, and a spacious wooden deck area. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, giving it a suburban or semi-urban residential feel.
description: A modern multi-story house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a rooftop terrace, and two outbuildings on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house's entryway, large windows, rooftop terrace, and both outbuildings on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed section, wooden deck, and the greenhouse outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of the outbuildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage/shed and greenhouse, with the main house's side elevation visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with steps, wide glass panels, and a covered porch area
